# viettelidc_ovpc_instance (Resource)

ViettelIDC Compute Instance (VM).



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `subnet_id` (String) Subnet to attach the primary NIC to.
- `template_id` (Number) VM template (image) integer ID.

### Optional

- `admin_pass` (String, Sensitive) Initial admin password.
- `availability_zone` (String) Availability zone.
- `cpu` (Number) Number of vCPUs.
- `instance_type_id` (Number) Instance type (package) integer ID.
- `key_pair_name` (String) Key pair name to inject into the instance.
- `memory` (Number) RAM in MB.
- `security_group_ids` (List of String) List of Security Group IDs to attach.
- `storage_type` (String) Root volume storage type: "SSD" or "HDD". Defaults to "HDD".
- `vpc_id` (String) VPC ID.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `image_id` (String)
- `image_name` (String)
- `ip_address` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `root_nic_id` (String) ID of the primary NIC auto-created with this instance. Use this to associate a Floating IP without creating a separate NIC.
- `status` (String)
